description: Create a content slide on J.P. Morgan alternatives platform access with a full-width header band, left-side proof points and KPI callouts, and a right-side donut chart showing six investment engines.

header.headline: Investing in Alternatives with J.P. Morgan

items.text: JPMorgan Chase & Co.; $7T+ client assets; 85M+ U.S. consumers; 170+ locations / markets; ~$18B technology spend
Active insight — Advantage in sourcing deals enhanced by our connections across J.P. Morgan
Expert value creators — Operating expertise as a result of owning complex businesses and assets
Outcomes that matter — Investment opportunities that are helping shape the future

footer.source: Source: All data J.P. Morgan Asset Management as at 12/31/2025 unless stated. 1 JPMC Annual Report 2025 2 JPMC, as of March 31, 2025 3 JPMAM, ISS Market Intelligence Simfund, public filings and company websites. Total J.P. Morgan AUM based on NAV, total GAV $284B. Includes custom glide path and retail advisory assets; includes AUM managed behalf of other investment teams.
